name: Chocolate Peppermint Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in cooled melted chocolate.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Alternately add the dry mixture to the chocolate mixture with buttermilk, beating until smooth.
6. Stir in vanilla extract and boiling water.
7. Pour batter into 3 (8 or 9-inch) layer pans lined on the bottoms with wax paper.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for about 30 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and cool completely.
10. Spread peppermint frosting between layers and on top and sides of the cake.
Peppermint Frosting:
1. Place all ingredients except peppermint extract, except water, in the top of a double boiler.
2. Heat over boiling water, stirring constantly.
3. Beat with a rotary beater or electric mixer for 7 minutes, or until mixture forms stiff peaks.
4. Add peppermint extract and stir gently.
